title: Omicron Could Knock a Fragile Economic Recovery Off Track
content: The latest zigzag in the pandemic has already curtailed travel, but its broader impact on growth and inflation isn’t likely to be known for several weeks.

org_facet: Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development

en_title: Omicron Could Knock a Fragile Economic Recovery Off Track
en_content: The latest zigzag in the pandemic has already curtailed travel, but its broader impact on growth and inflation isn’t likely to be known for several weeks.

title: Twitter and Facebook hit back at Chinese propaganda campaigns.
content: The social media giants removed a large number of accounts that promoted Covid-19 conspiracy theories and undermined reports of human rights abuses.

des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_title: Twitter and Facebook hit back at Chinese propaganda campaigns.
en_content: The social media giants removed a large number of accounts that promoted Covid-19 conspiracy theories and undermined reports of human rights abuses.

title: A Top Official Says the Fed Will ‘Grapple’ With a Faster Bond-Buying Taper
content: The president of the New York Federal Reserve said Omicron could prolong supply and demand mismatches, causing some inflation pressures to last.

more_info.byline: By Ben Casselman and Jeanna Smialek
org_facet: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

en_title: A Top Official Says the Fed Will ‘Grapple’ With a Faster Bond-Buying Taper
en_content: The president of the New York Federal Reserve said Omicron could prolong supply and demand mismatches, causing some inflation pressures to last.

title: A Game Designer in Beijing Bought Toy Guns. China Imprisoned Him.
content: San Cheng bought toy guns online as props for video game design. Then the police arrived, and he was jailed under China’s strict but messy gun laws.

more_info.byline: By Chris Buckley and Raymond Zhong

en_title: A Game Designer in Beijing Bought Toy Guns. China Imprisoned Him.
en_content: San Cheng bought toy guns online as props for video game design. Then the police arrived, and he was jailed under China’s strict but messy gun laws.

title: How to Carry Your Covid Health Data on a Smartphone
content: To plan for safe travels and gatherings this holiday season, here are some simple ways to take your Covid-related health data with you.
en_title: How to Carry Your Covid Health Data on a Smartphone
en_content: To plan for safe travels and gatherings this holiday season, here are some simple ways to take your Covid-related health data with you.

title: Prosecutors Push Elizabeth Holmes of Theranos to Take Responsibility
content: Under cross-examination, the founder of the failed blood testing start-up defended herself but admitted that she had made mistakes.
en_title: Prosecutors Push Elizabeth Holmes of Theranos to Take Responsibility
en_content: Under cross-examination, the founder of the failed blood testing start-up defended herself but admitted that she had made mistakes.

title: In China, Tesla Is a Catfish, and Turns Auto Companies Into Sharks
content: The electric car company is helping Chinese companies become global players in the emerging industry, posing a competitive threat to traditional rivals.
en_title: In China, Tesla Is a Catfish, and Turns Auto Companies Into Sharks
en_content: The electric car company is helping Chinese companies become global players in the emerging industry, posing a competitive threat to traditional rivals.

title: Venture Capital Funding for Crypto Companies Is Surging
content: It has risen more than in any other year, partly driven by the investing arms of large firms already in the crypto industry.
en_title: Venture Capital Funding for Crypto Companies Is Surging
en_content: It has risen more than in any other year, partly driven by the investing arms of large firms already in the crypto industry.

title: CNN Suspends Chris Cuomo After New Details on Help He Gave His Brother
content: The cable news network’s top-rated anchor was an intimate adviser to Andrew Cuomo in the last 18 months of his governorship.

en_title: CNN Suspends Chris Cuomo After New Details on Help He Gave His Brother
en_content: The cable news network’s top-rated anchor was an intimate adviser to Andrew Cuomo in the last 18 months of his governorship.

title: Dorsey’s Twitter Departure Hints at Tech Moguls’ Restlessness
content: Jack Dorsey, who is stepping down after six years as Twitter’s chief executive, is one of the tech leaders who seem to have grown tired of managing their empires.

en_content: Jack Dorsey, who is stepping down after six years as Twitter’s chief executive, is one of the tech leaders who seem to have grown tired of managing their empires.

title: ‘Where is **?’: Fans in China Elude Censors to Talk About Peng Shuai
content: She is not the first celebrity to be scrubbed from the internet, but her supporters are finding creative ways to voice their frustration.

title: The economic reality behind a Mississippi anti-abortion argument.
content: The state’s attorney general has said that, since Roe v. Wade, “women have carved their own way to achieving a better balance for success in their professional and personal lives.”

title: Britain Turns to Bankers to Blaze a Green Trail
content: The financial industry will be relied on to meet climate goals. NatWest, a lender to oil giants, provides a template.

title: Canada Goose workers vote to unionize in Winnipeg.
content: After a decisive election, about 1,200 employees of the parka maker will be represented by an affiliate of the Service Employees International Union.
en_title: Canada Goose workers vote to unionize in Winnipeg.

title: CNN and Chris Cuomo Face Difficult Questions After Anchor’s Suspension
content: The network said it was pursuing a “further evaluation” of evidence regarding its star anchor’s efforts to help stave off a sexual harassment scandal that his brother, former Gov. Andrew M. Cuomo, was facing.

title: Omicron Prompts Swift Reconsideration of Boosters Among Scientists
content: Many public health experts were opposed to a boosters-for-all approach. The new variant is changing some minds.
en_title: Omicron Prompts Swift Reconsideration of Boosters Among Scientists
en_content: Many public health experts were opposed to a boosters-for-all approach. The new variant is changing some minds.

title: Biden Projects Normalcy and Optimism as Omicron Poses New Threat

title: Square, Jack Dorsey’s payments company, changes its name to Block.

title: Inditex, a Spanish fashion giant, will be led by Marta Ortega, the founder’s daughter.

title: OPEC Faces Omicron Uncertainty and Rebellious Customers

title: The global economic recovery has been fast but uneven, a new report shows.
content: The organization predicted the global economy would grow 5.6 percent this year, but said a new virus-related downturn would hurt the United States and Europe differently.

title: Merck’s Covid Treatment Pill Wins Blessing of F.D.A. Panel
content: The treatment, known as molnupiravir, could be authorized in the United States within days, and available within weeks, if the F.D.A. follows the committee’s recommendation.

title: A federal judge blocks Biden’s vaccine mandate for U.S. health workers.
content: The ruling is a setback for the administration’s effort to require vaccination for hospital and nursing home workers, which had been set to start next week.

title: The U.S. gave $3.7 billion in relief to likely ineligible businesses, auditor finds.
content: The Small Business Administration skipped a basic fraud check and sent billions to recipients barred from receiving federal funds, the agency’s inspector general reported.

en_title: The U.S. gave $3.7 billion in relief to likely ineligible businesses, auditor finds.

title: South African Company Nears License to Sell J. & J. Covid Shot Across Africa
content: The new agreement makes Aspen Pharmacare the first African company to market a Covid vaccine on the continent. But it stops short of allowing Aspen to make the ingredients in the vaccine.

en_content: The new agreement makes Aspen Pharmacare the first African company to market a Covid vaccine on the continent. But it stops short of allowing Aspen to make the ingredients in the vaccine.

en_title: The head of Meta’s cryptocurrency efforts is leaving the company.

title: Jim Warren, Early Influencer in Personal Computing, Dies at 85
